# Icons required
Place the following PNG files in this directory:
- icon-192.png (192x192 pixels) — calm blue circle with white "J" letter
- icon-512.png (512x512 pixels) — same design, larger
- apple-touch-icon.png (180x180 pixels) — same design, for iOS home screen

You can create these with any image editor or online tool like favicon.io
Use background colour #185FA5 (blue) with white text.
